title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying flowers. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A woman is buying flowers at an outdoor flower stall. She is choosing a bunch of yellow flowers while the seller is holding another bouquet. There are many colourful flowers and plants on display.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people watching a street performer. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Several people are watching a musician in a town square. The musician is playing a guitar while two children are standing near the front. There are shops, a guitar case and benches nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
